hero.title: Your complete online presence solution
hero.subtitle: Domains, email, productivity tools, and security — everything you need to establish and protect your online identity.

services.title: Services You Can Trust
services.subtitle: Everything you need to build your online presence.

domains.title: Domain Names
domains.subtitle: Find the perfect domain name for your business
domains.description: Choose from 500+ top-level domain extensions and register your preferred domain at transparent, affordable prices. Manage all your domains from one intuitive dashboard with instant activation and free WHOIS privacy for life.

email.title: Professional Email
email.subtitle: Custom email addresses for your domain
email.description: Create professional email accounts that match your domain name. Impress clients and customers with branded email addresses that build credibility and trust for your business.

googleWorkspace.title: Google Workspace
googleWorkspace.subtitle: Productivity and collaboration tools
googleWorkspace.description: Streamline your business operations with Google Workspace. Get Gmail, Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Meet, and more — all integrated with your custom domain.

security.title: Advanced Security
security.subtitle: Protect your website and customer data
security.description: Secure your website with SiteLock malware scanning and advanced SSL certificates. Gain peace of mind knowing your site is protected against threats and your customers' data is encrypted.

pricing.title: Transparent Domain Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose from hundreds of domain extensions at competitive rates with no hidden fees.

items.a: DraveUp is an ICANN-accredited domain name registrar. We offer domain registration, transfers, WHOIS lookups, and professional email hosting — all at transparent, at-cost pricing.

items.q: Why register a domain with Drave?
items.a: We pass the savings directly to you with at-cost pricing on popular extensions. You also get free WHOIS privacy for life, a user-friendly dashboard, and expert support.
Search for your desired domain name, add it to your cart, and complete checkout. Your domain activates within minutes and you'll receive a confirmation email.

items.q: How do I manage my domain after purchase?
items.a: Log into your DraveUp dashboard to manage DNS settings, configure nameservers, renew your domain, set up email plans, and much more — all from one place.

finalCta.title: DraveUp has taken domain registration to the next level!
finalCta.subtitle: Join millions of domain owners who trust DraveUp for reliable, transparent registrar services.
